How's it going everybody? In this video we're going to talk about the terms of use and privacy policy. Now everybody should have one of these, every business should have one. You're going to want it linked on all of your pages, any funnels, you want to provide it to your members and clients, anybody who's going to interact with your business needs to have this accessible. We provide a template, it's linked below this video, and it is for US businesses only. You do need to refer to your own legal counsel to verify that the content meets and needs for your unique business. When your terms or privacy policy is provided and made available, you need to add a message to the top of your web pages. An example would be important by using this website, you agree to the term privacy policy and you want to link that terms privacy policy to it. Provided here and again at the link below, please review the information at the link. When potential clients and clients are opting in buying products, buying services, etc. Include a required checkbox that is not pre-filled that they have to click on to proceed with a message that says something like I agree to the term slash privacy policy and then link that to your terms and privacy policy just like before. That's it for this video, I hope you enjoyed it, make sure you've reviewed this in depth if you're going to use this template as a basis and then consult with your own legal counsel to make sure that it meets your requirements. Hope you have a great rest of your day.
